sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

def get_objects(seg):
    objs = []
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        objs.append({
            'color': n['color'],
            'pixels': n['pixels'],
            'bbox': (min(rows), min(cols), max(rows), max(cols))
        })
    return objs

print("Before:")
for o in get_objects(before):
    if o['color'] in ('c', 'N', 'W', 'G'):
        print(f"  color={o['color']} pixels={o['pixels']} bbox={o['bbox']}")
print("\nAfter:")
for o in get_objects(after):
    if o['color'] in ('c', 'N', 'W', 'G'):
        print(f"  color={o['color']} pixels={o['pixels']} bbox={o['bbox']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
